Here’s today’s recap of all of Liverpool’s transfer gossip:

PHILIPPE COUTINHO:
• According to Cule Manias, Barcelona still owe Liverpool in excess of £88m for the transfer of Philippe Coutinho.
• The Brazilian playmaker made the switch from Anfield to the Camp Nou in January, 2018 for a fee rising to £142m.
• This has been followed by a report from Calciomercato claiming the Reds supposedly have made an offer for the Brazilian to return to Anfield on a prospective two-year loan deal with an option to buy for £88m.
• It would be very unlikely Jürgen Klopp’s side would return for the 27-year-old this summer.

DANIEL STURRIDGE:
• The former Red has been linked with a shock move to Serie A outfit Bologna by the Express today, six weeks after being released by Liverpool.
• Sturridge moving abroad wouldn’t be the most far-fetched idea, but when considering the source, I think there is little chance of this materialising.

FEDOR CHALOV:
• Liverpool have been linked with Russian Golden Boot winner Fedor Chalov.
• The Mirror have said the striker has attracted interest from a host of Premier League sides including the Reds, as well as Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund.
• Chalov, who signed a contract extension at CSKA Moscow earlier this year could be available for around £20m.
• However, with Divock Origi having signed a new deal, and with Jürgen Klopp placing his faith in young starlet Rhian Brewster, it does seem unlikely the Reds would go for the 15-goal man.

TAIWO AWONIYI:
• CSKA Moscow have become the latest team to enquire about Liverpool forward Taiwo Awoniyi.
• The 21-year-old is a target for a number of clubs despite having never played a first-team game with the Reds due to work permit issues.
• And amidst this interest, Liverpool have set a £15m price tag for Awoniyi according to Ian Doyle, but are open to another loan move.
• It would be a shame to see Taiwo leave without having a chance to prove himself, but given how long it’s taking to get that work permit, his Anfield career just doesn’t look meant to be.
• Also, if Michael Edwards can sell on a player who’s never played a minute in a Liverpool shirt for £15m, he deserves a knighthood. 🔴 #LFC

利物浦領隊高普，一向擅於激勵同無限引發球員潛能，而且又精於改造球員，淨係睇羅拔圖法明奴攻中變射手、占士米拿中場變左閘、阿歷山大阿諾特中場變右後衞，就睇得出高普幾咁犀利。呢名德籍領隊最新Project，就係要將拉爾拉拿改造成「佐真奴費路式」防中！

高普15年當上利物浦主帥，拉爾拉拿於初期係高普愛將，踢攻中能攻擅守，表現光芒四射。可惜之後佢傷多過踢，近2季已成邊緣球員，有傳佢本季將被球隊放棄。但高普對呢名前英格蘭國腳仍有信心，熱身賽對巴拉福特就搵佢踢正選，不過唔係踢攻中，而係防中。

賽後高普咁講：「拉爾拉拿嘅技術特質，令佢可以勝任如車路士中場佐真奴費路嘅位置。希望沙利唔好留意到拉爾拉拿，唔係佢會出手收購都未定。拉爾拉拿預判比賽能力好好，往往能先人一步，而佢亦能於細小空間入面作出傳送，並提供無間斷嘅奔跑。佢同占士米拿拍檔嘅送效果唔錯，為利物浦提供多一個選擇。」

利物浦領隊高普，一向擅於激勵同無限引發球員潛能，而且又精於改造球員，淨係睇羅拔圖法明奴攻中變射手、占士米拿中場變左閘、阿歷山大阿諾特中場變右後衞，就睇得出高普幾咁犀利。呢名德籍領隊最新Project，就係要將拉爾拉拿改造成「佐真奴費路式」防中！

高普15年當上利物浦主帥，拉爾拉拿於初期係高普愛將，踢攻中能攻擅守，表現光芒四射。可惜之後佢傷多過踢，近2季已成邊緣球員，有傳佢本季將被球隊放棄。但高普對呢名前英格蘭國腳仍有信心，熱身賽對巴拉福特就搵佢踢正選，不過唔係踢攻中，而係防中。

賽後高普咁講：「拉爾拉拿嘅技術特質，令佢可以勝任如車路士中場佐真奴費路嘅位置。希望沙利唔好留意到拉爾拉拿，唔係佢會出手收購都未定。拉爾拉拿預判比賽能力好好，往往能先人一步，而佢亦能於細小空間入面作出傳送，並提供無間斷嘅奔跑。佢同占士米拿拍檔嘅送效果唔錯，為利物浦提供多一個選擇。」

Today’s transfer gossip has been all about some of Liverpool’s younger talent, and where they may be off to this season. Here’s a rundown of those rumours.

BEN WOODBURN & HERBIE KANE:
• Hull City are preparing a double loan swoop for Liverpool duo Ben Woodburn and Herbie Kane, according to the Hull Daily Mail.
• Another loan move for both players could benefit them, with playing time on Merseyside limited.
• Meanwhile, Neil Jones reports Kane is attracting interest from Brentford and Charlton after an impressive spell with Doncaster last term.

GEORGE JOHNSTON:
• Liverpool defender George Johnston has been attracting interest from a host of Championship sides according to reports.
• The Mirror claim West Brom, Preston, Hull, Wigan and Blackburn are all looking to acquire Johnston on a loan deal.
• A spell at a Championship side would be great for the centre half if he gets the chances. 🔴 #LFC

Here’s a recap of all of today’s Liverpool transfer rumours:

DEJAN LOVREN:
• AC Milan will struggle to sign Dejan Lovren this summer despite meeting with his agent, say to Calciomercato.
• LFC reportedly value the defender at €25m and, with Jürgen Klopp keen to retain Lovren’s services, will not consider selling him for anything less.
• With Milan being unwilling to shell out the €25m, combined with Lovren not requesting a move, possibly taking a pay cut and AC struggling with FFP, the chance of him leaving for Serie A looks low as things stand.

PHILIPPE COUTINHO:
• Phil Coutinho’s agent has weighed up whether or not a return to LFC from Barcelona is a possibility for the Brazilian playmaker.
• Speaking exclusively to TalkSport, the agent urged a potential deal ‘would be up to’ the Reds.
• If it’s ‘up to Liverpool’, it is very unlikely a deal would happen. Despite all these rumours, a Coutinho return is not on the table.

SIMON MIGNOLET:
• Jürgen Klopp has once again insisted Mignolet will be staying at LFC this summer, amidst rumours that the Belgian shot-stopper could be moving away due to a lack of playing time.
• Meanwhile, Simon has pledged to do whatever he can to help out Liverpool in the best way, hinting at him staying on Merseyside.

UGURCAN CAKIR:
• LFC have reportedly shown an interest in Trabzonspor keeper Ugurcan Cakir, making contact over his availability, according to Yağız Sabuncuoğlu.
• With the current shortage on keepers in the LFC ranks, it’s not shocking news to hear us interested in a shot-stopper.

DANI OLMO:
• Dani Olmo’s agent has reportedly ruled out a move to Man United for his player as they have not qualified for next season’s Champions League.
• The creative midfielder has attracted interest from a number of Europe’s top sides including Liverpool, however remains undecided on a move as of yet.
• The Spaniard’s urgency for Champions League football could bode well for the reigning European Champions.

DANI CEBALLOS:
• LFC have repeatedly been linked with a move for Dani Ceballos this summer.
